response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable polyglot engineer with 15+ years of experience and some exposure to high-throughput distributed systems, but the resume shows no evidence of the core competencies this role demands: experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging systems, telemetry/metrics pipelines, or growth engineering. His work history is predominantly web/mobile product development, direct mail automation, and GIS tooling. The Principal/IC6 level additionally requires demonstrated cross-team technical leadership, architectural ownership at organizational scale, and statistical/data aptitude for experimental analysis — none of which are evidenced here.
strengths: Polyglot background spanning JavaScript/TypeScript, C, C++, C#, Java, and DLang, satisfying the language breadth requirement
High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O
Staff-level track record with mentoring, DevOps ownership, and open-source project leadership demonstrating initiative beyond individual contributor scope
concerns: Zero demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the core of this role
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis work anywhere in the resume
No evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-team technical leadership, architectural strategy ownership, or driving multi-workstream initiatives across product surfaces

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or growth engineering background
